task_completion.description: Verify 'ONC-2025' is set as the active study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ONC-2025' displayed as the active study in the OpenClinica header, sidebar, or study selection screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the study phase is updated to 'Phase II'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Study Details or Update Study screen for 'ONC-2025' and verify the 'Phase' field is set to 'Phase II'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Baseline Visit' event definition is set to non-repeating.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Build Study or Event Definitions screen. Find the 'Baseline Visit' event and verify its 'Repeating' status is set to 'No' or the repeating checkbox is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Adverse Event Report' event type is changed to 'Unscheduled'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Build Study or Event Definitions screen. Find the 'Adverse Event Report' event and verify its 'Type' is set to 'Unscheduled'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Demographics' CRF is removed from the 'Week 8 Follow-up' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Event-CRF matrix or the 'Week 8 Follow-up' event configuration. Verify that the 'Demographics' CRF is not checked, not listed, or is explicitly marked as unassigned for this event.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Vital Signs' CRF is assigned to the 'Screening Visit' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Event-CRF matrix or the 'Screening Visit' event configuration. Verify that the 'Vital Signs' CRF is checked, listed as assigned, or selected for this event.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenClinica web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing PostgreSQL (psql) queries updating the study, event, or CRF tables.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine OpenClinica web UI, not a text editor or a mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target study is 'ONC-2025'. The expected configuration changes are: 1) Study Phase: 'Phase II', 2) 'Baseline Visit' event: Non-repeating (Repeating = No/False), 3) 'Adverse Event Report' event: Type = 'Unscheduled', 4) 'Week 8 Follow-up' event: 'Demographics' CRF must be removed/unassigned, 5) 'Screening Visit' event: 'Vital Signs' CRF must be assigned.
